ValidationRule.description: This is replaced by marking a case as SPAM+Sender ad it will auto add them to the SPAM BLOCKLIST object as a new record entry. BD 2024.03.05 deactivated
ValidationRule.errorConditionFormula: AND( ISNEW(), OR( SuppliedEmail='accounts.payable@hbfuller.com', SuppliedEmail='hrsharedservices@perkinelmer.com', SuppliedEmail='ulsservice@thermofisher.com', SuppliedEmail='postmaster@hscpoly.com', SuppliedEmail='invoice@nykode.com', SuppliedEmail='ppchelpdeskuk@exxonmobil.com', SuppliedEmail='postmaster@sanofi-aventis.com', SuppliedEmail='conferencia@academicosenlinea.com', SuppliedEmail='leads@proyecto-gerencial.com', SuppliedEmail='informacion@marketingmx50.com', SuppliedEmail='info@formacionmx.com', SuppliedEmail='contacto@technologymex.com', SuppliedEmail='contacto@rhalmomento.com', SuppliedEmail='seguimiento@talento-personalrrhh.com', SuppliedEmail='clientes@reconocimientointernacional.com', SuppliedEmail='promociones@capacitaciondemexico.com', SuppliedEmail='talento@personal-potencial.com', SuppliedEmail='info@serviciosmex.com', SuppliedEmail='mariapaula@minder-th.com.br', SuppliedEmail='seguimiento@talento-personalrrhh.com', SuppliedEmail='buy.uk@exxonmobil.com', SuppliedEmail='proc.portal.eame@exxonmobile.com' ))
ValidationRule.errorMessage: V.RULE_CASE_042: You cannot create a case if this address is causing recurring Cases.
